summary: The diff implements a comprehensive admin interface with image upload functionality (REQ-6), extends frontend hooks for image handling, and adds admin routing. However, no modifications to the ProductCard component are shown (REQ-8), and no backend implementation files are included in the diff (REQ-7). Frontend changes are well-implemented with proper type handling for ExternalBlob.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the ProductCard component to display uploaded images instead of placeholder images when available
missing_requirements.reason: ProductCard.tsx is listed in frontend-file-summaries.txt but not shown as modified in the diff. No evidence of changes to display uploaded images or implement fallback logic for placeholders.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend accepts image file uploads via a new endpoint or method
missing_requirements.reason: No backend file (backend/main.mo) is shown in the diff. While frontend hooks show useAddSnackItem mutation calling actor.addSnackItem with image parameter, there is no evidence the backend endpoint exists or was modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Images are stored persistently in stable storage
missing_requirements.reason: No backend implementation shown in diff to verify persistent storage of images in stable memory structures.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend returns the image data or URL when querying catalog items
missing_requirements.reason: No backend changes shown. While getAllSnackItems query exists in frontend hooks, there is no evidence the backend was modified to return image data with catalog items.
